project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with App Router
test_framework: vitest for unit/integration tests, playwright for E2E
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx vitest run tests/unit to verify unit tests pass. 2. Run npx next build to verify type-checking and build.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js 22 available. No database available for integration tests.
contribution_requirements: CSRF protection mandatory for state-changing requests. Dark mode is system-preference aware. Use Tailwind for styling. No console.log in production. Structured JSON errors from API.
key_patterns: - App uses Double Submit Cookie pattern for CSRF: cookie set at login, CsrfProvider intercepts fetch to add X-CSRF-Token header. - Sidebar defined in components/tenant/layout/sidebar.tsx with NAV_SECTIONS array. - Theme variables defined in app/globals.css using CSS custom properties (HSL format). - Dark mode via class strategy (next-themes with attribute='class'). - Layout shell in components/tenant/layout/shell.tsx wraps all tenant pages.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router (pages + API routes). components/ - React components (shared/, tenant/, ui/). lib/ - Server utilities. drizzle/ - DB schema. tests/ - vitest unit and integration tests.
